rationale: The citing paper uses Li and Xie (2020) for more than a passing mention: it cites that work to support the value of image analytics in social media research and, more specifically, to motivate testing a text-image interplay term in Study 1b. This is a concrete design and framing role tied to the citing paper's empirical model. Although the citation is not central to the main theory of status, it meaningfully informs how the author sets up the image-based analysis.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Li and Xie's insight that image content and image-text fit matter for social media outcomes, using it to justify examining joint text and image emotionality effects in its own models. It transfers that idea to a different focal outcome, perceived brand status rather than engagement.
